nasb.text: ‘Thus says the Lord God, “Because Moab and Seir say, ‘Behold, the house of Judah is like all the nations,’

esv.text: “Thus says the Lord God: Because Moab and Seir said, ‘Behold, the house of Judah is like all the other nations,’

cnv.text: 主耶和華這樣說：“因為摩押和西珥說：‘看哪！猶大家與列國毫無分別’，

ccb.text: “耶和华说，‘摩押和西珥嘲笑犹大与其他各国没有两样。
